login.subtitle: Sign in to manage sales and stock
login.rememberMe: Keep me signed in for 90 days
login.rememberMeHint: Don't tick this on a shared device.

dashboard.tillOpen: Till is open · {count, plural, =0 {no sales} =1 {# sale} other {# sales}} so far
dashboard.sellSubtitle: Open the till and ring up sales
dashboard.receiveStockSubtitle: Log a purchase from a supplier

sell.emptyCart: Empty cart — tap a category to start.
sell.noPermission: You aren't set up to sell on any channel yet. Ask the owner to give you access to at least one channel.
sell.tillClosedWarning: The till is closed. Cash sales will be refused.

settings.title: System config
settings.subtitle: Branding and look. Changes apply to everyone using the shop.
settings.shopNameHint: Shown on the sign-in screen and in the browser tab.
settings.themeHint: Tints the background across the whole app. Content panels stay white so forms and tables remain easy to read.
settings.logoHint: Shown on the sign-in screen, in the top bar, and as the browser tab icon. PNG or SVG with a transparent background works best. Max 2 MB.
settings.refreshTabs: Saved. Refresh other tabs to see the new look.

products.title: Products
products.emptyFiltered: Nothing matches. Try clearing the filters, or tap + New product.

form.codeHint: A short unique code (e.g. WATER-500ML). Cannot be changed later.
form.name: Name
form.iconOverrideHint: Leave empty to use the category icon.
form.emojiFallbackHint: Shown if a device can't render the icon above.
form.imageHint: Upload a photo for this product — the actual carton works best. Shown on the POS tile instead of the icon. Max 2 MB.

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Groups that organise products on the POS sell screen.
categories.empty: No categories yet. Tap + New category to group products on the sell screen.

form.name: Name
form.slugHint: Used in /sell URLs. Cannot be changed after creation.
form.emojiFallbackHint: Shown if a device can't render the icon above.
form.sortHint: Lower numbers appear first in the /sell grid. Same numbers sort by name.
form.imageHint: Upload a photo for this category. Shown on the POS tile instead of the icon. PNG, JPG, WebP, or SVG. Max 2 MB.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.subtitle: Who you buy from.
suppliers.empty: Nothing matches. Try clearing the search, or add a supplier above.

channels.title: Channels
channels.subtitle: Where you sell. Each channel can have its own prices.
channels.empty: Nothing matches. Try changing the status filter, or add a channel above.

form.name: Name
form.slugHint: Used in URLs. Cannot be changed after creation.

purchases.title: Purchases
purchases.subtitle: Stock you bought from suppliers. Draft = not yet received, Received = in stock.
purchases.empty: Nothing matches. Try clearing the filters, or log a new purchase above.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.subtitle: Money going out of the shop.
expenses.empty: No expenses match. Try clearing the filters, or log one above.

cash.title: Cash sessions
cash.subtitle: Open the till with the float, close with the count.
cash.cashSalesSoFar: Cash sales so far ({count, plural, =1 {# sale} other {# sales}})

adjustments.title: Losses
adjustments.subtitle: Stock that didn't sell — broken, expired, taken, or given away. Every entry needs a note.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Update your name, PIN, and language. Phone and role are set by the owner.
profile.name: Your name
profile.phoneNote: Locked — ask the owner if it needs to change.
profile.languageHint: Saved to your account so it follows you across devices.
profile.changePinHint: Leave blank to keep your current PIN.

form.name: Name
form.createNoChannelWarn: No channels exist yet. Create at least one first.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: How the shop is performing. Pick a period and read the numbers at a glance.
analytics.dashboardSubtitle: Net profit, top sellers, stock health
analytics.customDatesHint: Pick "Custom range" and the dates above to view a specific window. Otherwise the preset wins.
analytics.salesByDayHint: Tap the highest and lowest bars to spot patterns.
analytics.topProductsHint: Most units moved in this period.
analytics.lowStockCount: {count, plural, =0 {No products running low} =1 {# product running low} other {# products running low}}
analytics.outOfStockCount: {count, plural, =0 {Everything in stock} =1 {# product out of stock} other {# products out of stock}}
analytics.noData: Nothing here yet for this period.
analytics.currentCostNote: Cost of stock sold is approximate (uses current cost). Historical batch costing comes later.
analytics.noSalesYet: No sales in this period yet
analytics.noSalesHint: Once a few sales come in, the trend will appear here.

audit.title: Activity log
audit.subtitle: Sign-ins, big cash variances, and other things worth a glance. Last 30 days.
audit.empty: Nothing logged in the last 30 days.

reports.title: Daily summary
reports.subtitle: Sales, expenses, top sellers — by day.
